name: Lemon Basil Herb-And-Spice-Seasoned Salt Subs
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Dried lemon basil or Dill
1/4 teaspoon Grated dried lemon peel, finely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and blend well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a shaker with large holes.
3. Store in a cool, dark place.
4. Makes about 3 ounces.
